name: Maple Syrup Nut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients into a bowl.
2. Add the maple syrup, shortening, and milk to the dry mixture. Beat until well combined, about 2 minutes.
3. Add the eggs to the batter and beat for another 2 minutes.
4. Fold in the chopped nuts and mix until evenly distributed.
5. Divide the batter evenly between two greased and floured 9-inch pans.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 25 to 30 minutes.
7. Frost the cakes once baked.
Note: Serves 18
